MODULE: cosmos.health.ocr_parser
FILE: cosmos/health/ocr_parser.py (560 lines)
CATEGORY: health

DESCRIPTION: cosmos DeepSeek OCR2 Integration

Parses health documents (lab results, prescriptions, nutrition labels)
using DeepSeek OCR2 vision model via DeepInfra or local deployment.

CLASSES:
- OCRResult: Result from OCR processing.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- DeepSeekOCRParser: DeepSeek OCR2 document parser for health documents.

Supports:
- Lab results (bl
  Methods: async def parse_document(self, image_path: Union[str, Path], doc_type: DocumentType) -> OCRResult
  Methods: async def close(self)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def parse_health_document(image_path: Union[str, Path], doc_type: str='lab_result', api_key: Optional[str]=None) -
